## Definition of Done Checklist

- [ ] Acceptance criteria are fully met and mapped to this PR.
- [ ] Tests were added/updated for new behavior.
- [ ] `./.ao-tools/quality-gate.sh --skip-install` passed locally.
- [ ] API contract reviewed (`docs/openapi.yaml`) or marked as "no contract change".
- [ ] Ops impact reviewed (deployment, monitoring, rollback).
